sequencing_decision.summary: Deploy the write route and readback route together as a single feature unit.
sequencing_decision.reason: The readback is the canonical verification surface for the write route, and separate deployments would create non-verifiable intermediate state.

failure_mode_contract.transaction_boundary: single Postgres transaction wrapping snapshot, scope_labor_details, apparatus_financials, audit event, and idempotency cache writes
failure_mode_contract.success: 201 import_contract_support_persisted with committed ids and row counts
failure_mode_contract.idempotent_retry: 200 idempotent_hit returning original committed ids and row counts

multi_scope_fixture.required_by_packet: PM Lane 416 - Dry-Run Readiness Checkpoint Packet
verification: sum of apparatus_financials.quoted_revenue by scope equals scope_pool_amount for each scope
project-level sum of apparatus_financials.quoted_revenue equals contract_value

cross_lane_gate_inheritance.planning_packet_gate: none; Lane 412 is the readback surface being implemented
cross_lane_gate_inheritance.downstream_lane_280_gate: later Lane 280 admission requires Lane 412 readback classification = ready

inherits_unchanged: insert-only apparatus_financials with per-row internal-consistency CHECK
PM-and-Finance-only RLS grants on financial tables
explicit downstream gate from Lane 412 Revision B
